synopsis:
His X-wing damaged, Luke Skywalker is forced to land on the backwater world of Beheboth and wanders into a moisture-farming community in the district of Garrotine. Bartering for food in a cantina, he is drawn into a brawl with farmers who mistake him for a brigand until a woman named Darial Anglethorn intervenes. She explains that roving brigands have been stealing the settlement's precious water and hires Luke as a bodyguard, driving him to her walled moisture farm.

That night everyone on the farm, including Luke, mysteriously passes out. They wake to find the moisture vaporators destroyed and Darial gone. Luke tracks her across the deserts to the stronghold of a pirate named Gideon Longspar, whose men capture him. Longspar reveals he holds Darial and an alien entity called the Tirrith, a hive-minded being of sentient mystical energy. Having captured half of the entity, Longspar has forced it to poison the vaporators, turning the night air into a knockout gas so his men can steal the water. Luke frees Darial and tricks Longspar into destroying the pod holding the captured Tirrith particles. On the entity's advice, Darial reluctantly destroys the stronghold's water tanks, sweeping the guards away and letting them escape. Grateful, the reunited Tirrith charges the clouds with electrostatic energy and brings a badly needed rainfall to Beheboth.
title: Star Wars (1977) #66: The Water Bandits
